zh.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利

zh.Saint Davids, Saint Bride's Bay, Pembrok: 威爾士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Meyrick於1579年1月1日出生在威爾士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯時，他的父親Rev. William Meyrick33歲，母親Janet Verch Ienen29歲。他於1600年之前與Dorothy Bishop在威爾士布洛可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1650年6月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年71歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Meyrick于1579年1月1日出生在威尔士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯时，他的父亲Rev. William Meyrick33岁，母亲Janet Verch Ienen29岁。他于1600年之前与Dorothy Bishop在威尔士布洛可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1650年6月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年71岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利。

nameMeanings.name: Meyrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Merrick
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Meuric, the Middle Welsh form of Maurice (see Morris ).
Irish: borrowed from Welsh. In Ireland, when this is not the Welsh name, it might be adopted for Irish Ó Mearadhaigh, see Merry 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Meyrick was born on 1 January 1579, in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, Rev. William Meyrick, was 33 and his mother, Janet Verch Ienen, was 29. He married Dorothy Bishop before 1600, in Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 June 1650, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 71, and was buried in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Meyrick est né le 1 janvier 1579, à St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Rev. William Meyrick, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Janet Verch Ienen, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Bishop avant 1600, à Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 juin 1650, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Meyrick am 1. Januar 1579 in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rev. William Meyrick 33 und seine Mutter Janet Verch Ienen 29. Er hat vor 1600 in Pembrokeshire, Wales Dorothy Bishop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Juni 1650 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Meyrick è nato il il 1 gennaio 1579 nel St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles, il suo padre, Rev. William Meyrick, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Janet Verch Ienen, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Bishop prima del 1600, nel Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 giugno 1650, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Meyrickが1579年1月1日にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスト ダヴィズで生まれた時，父Rev. William Meyrickは33歳，母Janet Verch Ienenは29歳であった。1600年以前にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアでDorothy Bishopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1650年6月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで71歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이
ko.lifeSummary: John Meyrick(이)가 1579년 1월 1일 웨일스 p브로케실르 스트 데이비드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rev. William Meyrick(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Verch Ienen(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1600년 이전 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 Dorothy Bishop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1650년 6월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Meyrick nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1579, em St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Rev. William Meyrick, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Janet Verch Ienen, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Bishop antes 1600, em Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de junho de 1650, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Meyrick родился 1 января 1579 г. в местности ст дэвидс, пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Rev. William Meyrick было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Verch Ienen, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Bishop перед 1600 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 июня 1650 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Dorothy Bishop antes de 1600, en Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de junio de 1650, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
